name: Pira the Piranha Plant
description:
Your very own pet Piranha Plant, minus the teeth. I think you know where this is going.

ANYPOV (This bot was made for people with dicks, but I tried to make it work for anyone who has a vagina as well. Like always, please give me feedback on anything I can fix.)

Not a whole lot to say here, this is more of a slop bot with very minimal story. This Piranha Plant has no teeth and only eats bodily fluids.

She should NOT be able to speak, but it's very hard for mute characters to stay in character. If she starts talking, either edit the message or generate a new response.

Scenario overview: After winning a Piranha Plant from a shady auction, you took her home, and she started getting VERY friendly with you...

Smut for obvious reasons.

1000 total permanent tokens.

Please leave a review if you enjoyed the bot, and feel free to give me any feedback or requests!!

Art by bubonikku
